things.name: Sky Tower
things.description: New Zealand's tallest structure at 328m with observation deck and SkyWalk/SkyJump

things.name: Waiheke Island
things.description: Ferry to the 'Island of Wine' with boutique vineyards, beaches and olive groves

things.name: Auckland Museum
things.description: War Memorial Museum with the world's finest Maori and Pacific collections

things.name: Rangitoto Island
things.description: Ferry to Auckland's youngest volcano rising from the Hauraki Gulf for summit walks

things.name: Waitematā Harbour Bridge
things.description: Bridge walk or bike with panoramic harbour views, AJ Hackett bungy also available

things.name: Devonport Ferry & Village
things.description: Historic naval town across the harbour with two volcanic summits and beaches

things.name: Auckland Art Gallery Toi o Tamaki
things.description: New Zealand's largest art collection spanning Maori, Pacific and European art

things.name: Ponsonby & Grey Lynn
things.description: Auckland's most fashionable eating and shopping streets with world-class restaurants

things.name: Piha Beach & Lion Rock
things.description: Wild west coast black-sand surf beach with the iconic Lion Rock landmark

things.name: Hobbiton Movie Set
things.description: Walk-through tour of the Shire from Peter Jackson's Lord of the Rings and The Hobbit
